c.d: The number of active users on the app which impacts the ability to find and keep up with friends
Types of features offered such as live video calls, group chats, interest tags, event organizing, and real-time photo sharing
Measures to ensure trustworthy connections and reduce harassment or fake profiles
Support for features making distant friendships easier, such as video messaging, shared experiences, and tight bonds
Mechanisms that keep users actively connected like games, events, or interactive content
